title: Skip a test in Travis that has timeout issues
body: The built-in volume tests pull a 150mb image, which is too much for Travis' network and causes timeout issues. Temporary fix for #1040 until we can get a smaller image to test with.

comments.body: All green.  Can an approver review?  It would be good to avoid this particular flake for now, although there have been a few other flakes in recent Travis tests that seem orthogonal to this particular issue.
